message:
fix(startup): close profiler spans in BeginPhase1/BeginPhase2

The profiler spans created in BeginPhase1() and BeginPhase2() were never
closed (End() was never called), leaving orphan spans with zero duration.

This fix immediately ends the spans after creation, creating instant
marker spans that properly record their timestamp. This matches the
pattern used in EndPhase1() and EndPhase2() which correctly create and
end their spans.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
